name: IG Markets
description_short: World's largest CFD and spread betting provider with 17,000+ markets, ProRealTime charting, and 50 years of trading heritage.
description_long:
IG Markets (commonly known as IG) is the world's largest CFD provider by revenue and one of the most established names in online trading, founded in 1974. The platform offers CFDs and spread betting (in select jurisdictions) across over 17,000 markets including forex, indices, shares, commodities, cryptocurrencies, and more.

IG's proprietary web platform is clean and intuitive, while serious traders can access ProRealTime — a professional-grade charting and automated trading platform included free with an active account. IG also supports MetaTrader 4 and offers L2 Dealer for direct market access (DMA) trading on shares.

The broker is regulated by the FCA, ASIC, BaFin, and other top-tier regulators. US clients can access forex trading through IG's US entity. IG's educational resources are among the best in the industry, with IG Academy offering structured courses from beginner to advanced levels. The platform also provides real-time Reuters and Twitter feeds, economic calendars, and client sentiment data.
pros: 50+ years of operating history — highly trusted
Excellent educational content via IG Academy
Regulated by FCA, ASIC, and other top authorities
cons: CFDs not available to US clients (forex only)
Spread betting only available in UK/Ireland
Share CFD commissions can be high
meta_description: World's largest CFD and spread betting provider with 17,000+ markets, ProRealTime charting, and 50 years of trading heritage.
